DP.235.0000:
In Amity Square, you may go for
a stroll with a cute Pokémon.\f
The permitted Pokémon are: PIKACHU,
CLEFAIRY, PSYDUCK, PACHIRISU,\r
HAPPINY, BUNEARY, and DRIFLOON.\f
Please do come back with one!\f
DP.235.0001:
In Amity Square, you may go for
a stroll with a cute Pokémon. Okey?\f
The permitted Pokémon are: PIKACHU,
CLEFAIRY, PSYDUCK, PACHIRISU,\f
HAPPINY, BUNEARY, and DRIFLOON,
JIGGLYPUFF, TORCHIC, SKITTY,\r
and SHROOMISH.\f
Please do come back with one!
Okey?\f
DP.235.0002:
In Amity Square, you may go for
a stroll with a cute Pokémon.\f
Okey? Would you like to go for
a stroll with your [0101,0000]?
DP.235.0003:
Please do enjoy your time together,
just the two of you! Okey?\f
DP.235.0004:
Oh, okey? Then you would rather go
for a stroll with your [0101,0000]?
DP.235.0005:
I see. Please come back if you happen
to have a change of heart. Okey?\f
DP.235.0006:
Are you feeling refreshed?
Please come again! Okey?\f
DP.235.0007:
Your [0101,0000] looks quite pleased
following you around.\f
It really is adorable!
DP.235.0008:
Okey? The owner of Amity Square?\f
I’m sure the owner is somewhere on
the grounds.\f
Seeing Trainers with their Pokémon
makes our owner happy.
DP.235.0009:
You may find useful items on the ground.\f
They’re quite small, however.
Your Pokémon may find them.\f
You should try talking to your
Pokémon every so often. Okey?
DP.235.0010:
Are you enjoying your stroll?\f
You should try talking to your
Pokémon. It will be happy you did.
DP.235.0011:
It makes me happy seeing all the
cute Pokémon and their kind\r
Trainers.
DP.235.0012:
You may spend all the time you
like in Amity Square. Okey?
DP.235.0017:
[0101,0000] is picking at the ground
for some reason...
DP.235.0020:
[0101,0000] seems to be so happy
it can’t keep still.
DP.235.0021:
[0101,0000] seems to be enjoying
the walk.
DP.235.0023:
Those are ruins from a time long,
long ago.
DP.235.0025:
I come here with my HAPPINY
every single day!\f
I can let it run free without any
worries at all.
DP.235.0027:
Ooh, I just can’t believe it!
I’m so overjoyed with my PIKACHU!\f
Wherever I go, my PIKACHU follows
me without hesitation!\f
Ahaha! It’s just the two of us!
Woohoo!
DP.235.0029:
You should talk to your Pokémon.
It can occasionally find things.
DP.235.0030:
There is something shiny in CLEFAIRY’s
hands...
